prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Major Depressive Disorder
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.7 kg; Height 168.5 cm; BMI 31.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 89.8kg; 9 months ago 88.9kg; 6 months ago 90.1kg; 3 months ago 87.3kg; current 89.7kg), Height (12 months ago 168.5cm; 9 months ago 168.5cm; 6 months ago 168.5cm; 3 months ago 168.5cm; current 168.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 90mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 6.0U/L; 3 months ago 5.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 5.0U/L; 3 months ago 6.5U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 458mg/g; 9 months ago 493mg/g; 6 months ago 388mg/g; 3 months ago 392mg/g; current 271mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.2g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
